title: ionopsidium glastifolium
intro: Ionopsidium glastifolium, also known as Chinese Thunder of Heaven or Thunder of Heaven, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ionopsidium glastifolium include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be consumed as a capsule or tablet, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
